creator: seth@freebie.dp.ny.frb.org
text:
From the "make install":

===>  Installing for xanim-2.80.1
.
.
.
===>   Registering installation for xanim-2.80.1


However:

freebie 516: xanim -ver
XAnim Rev 2.80.0 by Mark Podlipec Copyright (C) 1991-1999. All Rights Reserved
Usage:
   XAnim [options] anim [ [options] anim ... ]
   -h  lists some common options, but may be out of date.
   See xanim.readme or the man page for detailed help.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install xanim, note version number.  Run xanim.  Note version number.
